response.original_title: More Than a Test: The Rise of the Unsilenced Movement
response.overview: In this short documentary film, Unsilenced Movement founder Shelby Smith reveals the dark underbelly of voiding cystourethrograms (VCUGs), the "gold standard" diagnostic test to diagnose vesicoureteral reflux (VUR) in pediatric patients.
response.title: More Than a Test: The Rise of the Unsilenced Movement
